rows.source_ref: shakesfx, "I have found the Holy Grail!", BabyPips.com forum thread (2009), https://forums.babypips.com/t/i-have-found-the-holy-grail/18683 ; embeds Linda Bradford Raschke, "Tape Reading" article
rows.strategy_name: Holy Grail is within you — discretionary tape reading
rows.concept: Edge rests entirely on discretionary tick-by-tick price/tape reading and trader intuition, with no indicators and no defined mechanical rules.
rows.eligibility_reason: Pure discretionary tape reading ('the Holy Grail is within you') with no deterministic entry/exit or parameters — unmechanizable; the only concrete concept in the thread (mp6140's linear-regression-channel bounce-to-midline) is paramless and explicitly paired with a 'no stop loss EVER' doctrine incompatible with FTMO/DXZ.
rows.notes: Thread is 90% forum chatter/flame-war plus later accusations the OP was self-promotion/signal-fishing. Secondary concepts noted but none usable: (1) embedded Linda Raschke 'Tape Reading' article — discretionary pivot-point (prev-day H/L, open) and 'whoosh' impulsive-continuation-2/3-of-the-time observation, not a mechanical system; (2) mp6140 LRC channel mean-reversion (bounce off band, hold to midpoint) — real concept but no channel period/deviation/timeframe and no-stop doctrine, would be just another MR variant with LOW fit. Zero implementable deterministic candidates.

notes: Read via pdftotext -layout (Read tool lacked pdftoppm); full 1906-line text reviewed.
Zero usable candidates -> single REJECTED summary row per schema.
Discretionary/psychology thread; only concrete rule fragment (LRC bounce-to-midline) is paramless + no-stop, folded into notes.
